title: BEM-873 verify decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:49 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
responses=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            relevant='bem871' in low or 'bem870' in low or 'iterative protocol' in low
            if bad: blockers.append({'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:600]})
            elif ok and relevant: responses.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt[:3000]})
if responses:
    latest=responses[-1]['text'].upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in latest: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in latest: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in latest: decision='BLOCKED'
    else: decision='UNKNOWN'
else:
    decision='MISSING'
if decision=='APPROVED':
    status='bem870_protocol_approved'
    next_action='mark approved and resume roadmap'
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    status='bem870_protocol_not_approved'
    next_action='extract concrete patchable changes and patch again'
else:
    status='bem871_response_missing_or_unknown'
    next_action='repair response dispatch/filter; BEM871 decision not found'
state={'bem':'BEM-873','status':status,'decision':decision,'responses':responses[-5:],'blockers':blockers[-5:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem873_verify_bem871_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem873_verify_bem871_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-873 | Verify BEM-871 Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem873_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-873'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem873_verify_bem871_decision.json','governance/reports/bem873_verify_bem871_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem873_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified Claude decision for BEM870 iterative patched protocol after BEM871 approval request and BEM872 tick')
"""
No issue comments.
